notes_md:
**dẫn đầu** = to lead, to be in first place. It’s used when someone or something is ahead of others in a competition, ranking, market, or group.

It often goes with competitions, rankings, markets, teams, companies, countries. You’re focusing on position (number one), not just guiding people.


Close synonym: **đứng đầu** (very similar, also “to be at the top”). Opposite idea: **xếp cuối** (to rank last).
exampleSentencesTranslated: His team wants to lead in this year's singing contest.
She always tries to lead at work in the company.
This morning, I saw our school lead the rankings.

translation.en: We need to lead this group.

example.es: Nuestro equipo está liderando la clasificación.
example.en: Our team is leading the standings.
example.vi: Đội bóng của chúng ta dẫn đầu bảng xếp hạng.

definitions.en: to be in the lead or at the forefront
definitions.vi: ở vị trí dẫn đầu hoặc ở tuyến đầu
definitions.es: estar a la cabeza o en la vanguardia

exampleSentences: Nhóm của anh dẫn đầu trong cuộc thi hát năm nay.
Chị luôn cố gắng dẫn đầu trong công việc ở công ty.
Sáng nay, em nhìn thấy trường mình dẫn đầu bảng xếp hạng.

translation.en: Who will lead in the competition?

notes:
dẫn đầu = to lead, to be in first place. It’s used when someone or something is ahead of others in a competition, ranking, market, or group.

It often goes with competitions, rankings, markets, teams, companies, countries. You’re focusing on position (number one), not just guiding people.

Close synonym: đứng đầu (very similar, also “to be at the top”). Opposite idea: xếp cuối (to rank last).
